title: Nursery Rhyme. CXI. Scholastic.
content:
Tell tale, tit!
        Your tongue shall be slit,
        And all the dogs in the town
        Shall have a little bit.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CXI. Scholastic." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
